title: LiveChatMessageListResponse
description: A list of live chat message resources for a given broadcast.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveChatMessageListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

pollingIntervalMillis.description: The amount of time the client should wait before polling again, in milliseconds.

offlineAt.description: The date and time when the underlying stream went offline.

items.description: A list of chat messages that match the request criteria.
